background: An instrument consisting of $k$ units operates for a time $t$. The reliability of each unit during the time $t$ is $p$. When the time $t$ passes, the instrument stops functioning, a technician inspects it and replaces the units that failed. The technician needs a time $s$ to replace one unit.

task.query: Find the probability that in the time $2s$ after the stop the instrument will be ready for work.
Calculate the probability in part (a) when $p=0.9$ and $k=10$.
